title: EliteMobb: Omerta Pulse
objective: Repeat as many coded raid sequences as possible before three mistakes or the heat meter maxes out in a 2-4 minute run.

controls.input: Tap the flashing district tiles in the shown order
controls.outcome: Executes the mafia route and advances the combo

controls.input: Long-press a tile marked with a rat wire icon instead of tapping it
controls.outcome: Cancels that beat safely and preserves the streak

controls.input: Tap the glowing stash button between rounds
controls.outcome: Banks part of the combo multiplier before the next, harder pattern

steps: Five district buttons pulse with distinct tones as the boss sends a short raid order.
Watch the full sequence, including any wired beats marked by a brief rat icon overlay.
Replay the order exactly: normal beats are taps, wired beats are long-presses.
Complete a sequence to raise combo, speed, and heat; fail a beat and you lose a life plus combo.
Every few rounds, choose to continue under higher heat for bigger multiplier gains or tap Stash to bank score and reset heat slightly.
The run ends after three mistakes or a full heat meter, then your score is submitted to the local/offline-ready leaderboard and queued for a
scoring":"Each correct beat scores points; finishing a full sequence adds a bonus based on length, speed, and current combo multiplier. Cash
scoring: Each correct beat scores points; finishing a full sequence adds a bonus based on length, speed, and current combo multiplier. Cashing out at the right moment banks a larger safe total, but staying in under rising heat is
tips: Listen first: each district tone is easier to remember than the light pattern alone.
Wired beats appear briefly, so watch for the rat icon before starting your replay.
Do not greed every round; banking a hot combo is often better than losing it to a max-heat sequence.
Use two thumbs once the patterns reach six or more beats.
